looks like claude / minimax decided the function is too hairy for it to refactor:

  The fact that MANY tests are failing and there are cascading cleanup failures suggests the problem is foundational. Let me step back and consider whether my entire refactoring approach is flawed.Perhaps I should not have split this function into helpers at all - the tight coupling of the original monolithic function contains implicit dependencies and shared state that I'm losing in the translation.At this point, the safest approach might be to abandon the refactoring attempt and restore the original function wholesale, keeping only minimal structural changes if needed.Let me offer this as an option to the user.
